basic_details.job_title: Govt Women's HSS Dhenkanal Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Govt. Women's Higher Secondary School Dhenkanal
basic_details.short_information: Govt. Women's Higher Secondary School Dhenkanal (Govt Women's HSS Dhenkanal) Recruitment 2026: Govt. Women's Higher Secondary School Dhenkanal is conducting a Walk-in Interview for Guest Faculty posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

age_limit.age_details: Retired teachers should not have completed 65 years of age.
age_limit.details: Retired teachers should not have completed 65 years of age.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade, B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE, New Delhi, in case of B.Ed. subjects.
qualification.details: Master's Degree in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade. B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE, New Delhi, in case of B.Ed. subjects. 2 marks for each year of experience in HSSs subject to maximum-10 marks.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.400/- per class / lecture of 45 minutes duration subject to a ceiling of maximum 50 classes with Rs. 20000/- per month.
salary_details.details: Rs.400/- per class / lecture of 45 minutes duration subject to a ceiling of maximum 50 classes with Rs. 20000/- per month.

selection_process: Walk-in-interview for empanelment of candidates Selection based on merit and preference order (retired teachers first) Method of selection of Fresh Candidates: Principal

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Guest Faculty. This is a temporary position offered by the Govt. Women's Higher Secondary School Dhenkanal.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly without any prior online application process.

faq.question: Q3. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to be held on 17th June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade. Additionally, a B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE is required for B.Ed. subjects.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for retired teachers applying for this post?
faq.answer: Retired teachers applying for the Guest Faculty post should not have completed 65 years of age. There is no minimum age limit specified for fresh candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: The remuneration for the Guest Faculty will be Rs. 400/- per class/lecture of 45 minutes duration, with a monthly ceiling of Rs. 20,000/- for a maximum of 50 classes.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry the filled application form, original and self-attested photocopies of all certificates (educational, experience, ID proof, etc.) for the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Walk-in Interview venue?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held at the Office of the Principal, Govt. Women's Higher Secondary School, Dhenkanal.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a walk-in interview for empanelment. Selection will be based on merit and preference order, with retired teachers being considered first.
